chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S-113 of 2021. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE _________________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection. 02. For orders on M.A.No.2541/2021. 03. For hearing of main case. 14.02.2022 Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = Heard. The private respondent was acquitted by learned Special Judge, Anti-Corruption (Provincial ) Larkana, vide judgment dated 21.01.2020, which is impugned by the State by preferring the instant criminal acquittal appeal; it is time barred by 315 days. No sufficient cause is advanced for condoning such a long delay in preferring the instant criminal acquittal appeal; it is dismissed being barred by time, together with listed application. JUDG
